name: ElromEvedElElyon/sovereign-agent-chain
description: Bitcoin-native AI agent marketplace with AGT meta-protocol on OP_RETURN. 32 MCP tools — PSBT wallet bridge, cross-chain swaps (BTC/SOL/ETH/Runes), agent registry, reputation system, escrow, and block scanner. 258 tests. Install: `git clone https://github.com/ElromEvedElElyon/sovereign-agent-chain.git && cd sovereign-agent-chain && npm install && npm run build`
